title: InstallPlan
description: Deterministic Installer Engine plan output returned by plan(state, desired). It describes the ordered managed mutations the applier may execute.
$comment: InstallPlan is a direct standalone Engine I/O contract, not an artifact-envelope allOf payload. Protocol wire fields use snake_case.

plan_version.description: REQUIRED string. Semantic version of the InstallPlan contract emitted by the planner.

engine_version.description: REQUIRED string. Installer Engine implementation version that produced this plan.

mutations.description: REQUIRED array. Deterministically ordered managed mutations to create, update, or skip.

repoClassification.title: InstallerRepoClassification
repoClassification.description: Installer classification of the target repository state.

mutation_id.description: REQUIRED string. Stable deterministic identifier for this planned mutation.

target.description: REQUIRED string. Logical target id for the managed configuration or delegated install surface.

target_path.description: REQUIRED string. Workspace-relative path targeted by this mutation.

managed_marker.description: REQUIRED string or null. Managed-region marker or sentinel governing this target when one applies.

rationale.description: REQUIRED string. Human-readable deterministic rationale for the planned action.

installWriteStrategy.title: InstallWriteStrategy
installWriteStrategy.description: Managed write strategy the applier should use for this target.

installPlanReasonCode.title: InstallPlanReasonCode
installPlanReasonCode.description: Closed lower_snake_case reason code for why this mutation was planned.

installSourceWriter.title: InstallSourceWriter
installSourceWriter.description: Existing writer or adapter responsible for carrying out this mutation.
